0.text: Increased bronchial wall thickness in the right lung middle lobe lateral segment

1.text: Secretion in the bronchial lumen in the right lung middle lobe lateral segment

2.text: Parenchymal ground glass opacity in the right lung middle lobe lateral segment

4.text: Nodular infiltrations with a tree-in-bud pattern

6.text: Pneumonic infiltration in the lateral segment of the right lung middle lobe
